# decimal128 NON-CANONICAL (one-way) encoding vectors
# Each row: canonical_text , BID_hex , DPD_hex
# BOTH encodings DECODE to canonical_text, but at least one is a
# non-canonical bit pattern the canonical encoder would never emit.
# => ONE-WAY: a consuming test must check DECODE only
#    (fromBID(hex).toString()==text AND fromDPD(hex).toString()==text);
#    it must NOT assert that re-encoding reproduces these bits.
# Within a row the BID and DPD patterns generally differ.
#
# Format: comma-separated. '#' begins a comment to end of line.
#         Blank lines and surrounding whitespace are ignored.
#   hex = 0x + 32 UPPERCASE hex digits, most-significant word first.
#
# Total: 1262 rows.
#

# ================== INFINITY — non-canonical trailing/exponent bits (BID & DPD) (12) ====
-Infinity                               , 0xF8000000000000000000000000000001 , 0xFBFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
-Infinity                               , 0xF800000000000000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF , 0xFBFFFFFFFFFFFFFF0000000000000000
-Infinity                               , 0xF9555555555555555555555555555555 , 0xF800000000000000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
-Infinity                               , 0xFAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA , 0xF9555555555555555555555555555555
-Infinity                               , 0xFBFFFFFFFFFFFFFF0000000000000000 , 0xF8000000000000000000000000000001
-Infinity                               , 0xFBFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF , 0xFAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Infinity                                , 0x78000000000000000000000000000001 , 0x7BFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
Infinity                                , 0x7800000000000000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF , 0x7BFFFFFFFFFFFFFF0000000000000000
Infinity                                , 0x79555555555555555555555555555555 , 0x7800000000000000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
Infinity                                , 0x7AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA , 0x79555555555555555555555555555555
Infinity                                , 0x7BFFFFFFFFFFFFFF0000000000000000 , 0x78000000000000000000000000000001
Infinity                                , 0x7BFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF , 0x7AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
